_comment: B-15 — Curated allow-list of TruNorth slugs whose primary business is tobacco (cigarettes, cigars, smokeless, vaping subsidiaries of these parents). Source: Wikipedia 'List of largest tobacco companies' + each parent's brand portfolio. Sub-brands resolve via brand-parent-map. Curated conservatively 2026-06-07.

_format.rationale: <one line: why this brand is a tobacco industry member>

altria-group.rationale: U.S. tobacco parent (Philip Morris USA, US Smokeless Tobacco, John Middleton, NJOY).

philip-morris-international.rationale: Global tobacco multinational; Marlboro outside US, IQOS heat-not-burn.

british-american-tobacco-p-l-c.rationale: Global tobacco parent (Lucky Strike, Dunhill, Newport, Camel via Reynolds American).

r-j-reynolds-tobacco-company.rationale: U.S. operating subsidiary of BAT — Camel, Newport, Pall Mall.

marlboro.rationale: Flagship cigarette brand of Philip Morris/Altria.
